text: As a 50th anniversary present to Mizar we created an AI/TP system which can prove more than 60% of Mizar theorems in the “hammer” setting, and 75% of the Mizar theorems when the automated provers are assisted by only using the assumptions used in the corresponding Mizar proofs. We give a detailed account of our methods and experiments which consisted of E and Vampire with various ENIGMA and Deepire extensions, learning-based premise selection techniques including also symbolic search, and in particular an incremental loop consisting of maintaining a repository of tens of millions of ATP proofs of simple theorems and training AI/TP systems to prove more complicated theorems using this corpus. We include a number of examples of Mizar theorems proved automatically by the new system.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written

We give a detailed account of our methods and experiments which consisted of E and Vampire with various ENIGMA and Deepire extensions, learning-based premise selection techniques including also symbolic search, and in particular an incremental loop consisting of maintaining a repository of tens of millions of ATP proofs of simple theorems and training AI/TP systems to prove more complicated theorems using this corpus.
